name: Chocolate Mint Brownie Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Melt the 3/4 cups of mint chocolate chips in a saucepan over the lowest heat.
3. Remove from heat and stir until smooth. Return to heat briefly, stirring every few seconds until smooth again.
4. Allow to cool to room temperature.
5. In a mixing bowl, combine the melted chocolate chips, margarine, vanilla, and egg whites.
6. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, remaining mint chocolate chips, sugars, baking soda, and salt.
7. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients until just moistened.
8. Drop dough by rounded tablespoons onto prepared baking sheets.
9. Bake for 12 minutes or until the edges are set but centers are still soft.
Serving Ideas: Sprinkle with powdered sugar after baking.
